full_text:
Sun Luyu (Xiaohu) 孫魯育 (小虎)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Luyu (孫魯育), styledXiaohu (小虎). Daughter of Sun Quan and Lady Bu. Sister to Sun Luban. Zhu Ju’s wife. Sun Luyu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
